claim: Khalid Saqr is a researcher-builder working across computational fluid dynamics, biofluid mechanics, high-fidelity modelling and simulation, AI-assisted research systems, and knowledge engineering.
Khalid Saqr’s work spans computational fluid dynamics, biofluid mechanics, neurovascular biomechanics, and high-fidelity modelling and simulation.
Public CV source states that Khalid Saqr identified non-Kolmogorov turbulence in human circulation.
Public CV source states that Khalid Saqr developed the first high-fidelity computational model of the Circle of Willis.
Khalid Saqr founded KNOWDYN Ltd., London, UK.
The Scopus BibTeX export substrate contains 86 publication records spanning 2007–2026, including 70 clean DOI records.
